_comment: Files allowed to call resend.emails.send() directly. sendEmail (lib/comms/send-email.ts) is the choke point: opt-out check, central branded EmailLayout, Resend idempotency key, and the communication_log row the delivery webhook joins on via external_id. Bypassing it ships unbranded, unlogged mail that is invisible to the delivery-feedback loop. This list only SHRINKS.
_permanent_exception: submitContactForm.ts is INBOUND, not outbound: it forwards to Pleks whatever a stranger typed into the public contact form. Routing it through sendEmail would (a) write an unauthenticated third party's PII into the communication_log audit trail, and (b) make the delivery-feedback loop track it as if Pleks had sent a message to itself. It has no org, no recipient relationship, and no opt-out semantics. It stays a direct Resend call by design — this is not debt.
